info.name: Payroll Management API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Payroll Management System.

**Base URL:** `http://localhost:8000/api/v1`

## Setup
1. Set the `base_url` variable to your server (default: `http://localhost:8000`).
2. Run **Login** — the `access_token` is saved automatically via the test script.
3. For Super Admin endpoints, run **Super Admin Login** — the `super_admin_token` is saved automatically.
4. Replace placeholder IDs (`{{employee_id}}`, `{{invoice_id}}`, etc.) with real ObjectIds from your database.

## Roles
- `company_admin` — full access to all company endpoints
- `hr_manager` — employees, departments, payroll, salary structures
- `accountant` — invoices, clients, tax rates, dashboard
- `staff` — read-only access
- `super_admin` — platform management only

## Response Format
All responses follow `{ success, message, data?, meta? }`. Pagination endpoints include a `meta` object with `{ page, limit, total, totalPages }`.

variable.description: JWT access token — auto-populated by the Login request test script
JWT access token for super admin — auto-populated by Super Admin Login test script
MongoDB ObjectId of an invoice template
MongoDB ObjectId of a payroll run
MongoDB ObjectId of a salary slip
MongoDB ObjectId of a salary structure
MongoDB ObjectId of a tax rate
Public share token for invoice links

request.description: Returns server health status and timestamp. No authentication required.

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Register, login, token management, email verification, and password management.

request.description:
Register a new company and its initial admin user. An email verification link is sent to `registrationEmail`. The company starts in **pending** status and requires super admin approval.

**Rate limited.**

exec: console.log('✅ access_token saved to collection variables');

request.description:
Login as a company user. The refresh token is set as an `HttpOnly` cookie automatically by the server. The `access_token` collection variable is populated automatically via the test script.

**Rate limited.**

Requirements:
- Email must be verified
- Company must be approved and active

exec: console.log('✅ super_admin_token saved to collection variables');

request.description:
Login as a super admin (platform operator). The `super_admin_token` collection variable is populated automatically via the test script.

**Rate limited.**
Refresh the access token using the `refreshToken` HttpOnly cookie. Returns a new access token and rotates the refresh token.
Invalidate the current session. Revokes the refresh token and clears the cookie.
Get the currently authenticated user's profile. Works for both company users and super admins.
List all approved companies the authenticated user (matched by email) has access to. Useful for multi-company accounts.

exec: console.log('✅ access_token updated after company switch');

request.description: Switch the active session to a different company the user belongs to (matched by email). Issues new auth tokens for the target company.

Request a password reset email. Always returns success to avoid leaking which emails exist.

**Rate limited.**

Reset password using the token received via email. Invalidates all existing sessions.

**Rate limited.**

Verify email address using the token from the verification email. For company admin registrations, this also submits the company for super admin review.

**Rate limited.**

Resend the email verification link. Always returns success to avoid leaking which emails exist.

**Rate limited.**

Change the authenticated user's password. Requires the current password for verification.

**Requires authentication.**

item.name: Super Admin
item.description: Platform management endpoints — accessible only to super admins.

request.description: Get a high-level platform overview: total companies, pending approvals, active companies, and user counts.

query.description: Search by company name or email
Filter by status: pending | approved | rejected
Filter by active status: true | false

request.description: Paginated list of all companies. Filter by `status` (pending | approved | rejected) or `isActive`.
Get full details of a single company by ID.
List all users belonging to a specific company.
Approve a company registration. Sends approval email to the company admin.
Reject a company registration with a mandatory reason. Sends rejection email to the company admin.
Suspend an active company, preventing its users from logging in.
Reactivate a previously suspended company.

item.name: Company
item.description:
Manage the authenticated user's company profile and settings.

**Required roles:** company_admin (write), any role (read).

request.description: Get the authenticated user's company profile including settings, branding, and onboarding status.

body.raw:
{
  "legalName": "Acme Corporation Ltd.",
  "industry": "Technology",
  "brandColor": "#2563EB",
  "address": {
    "line1": "123 Business Street",
    "line2": "Suite 400",
    "city": "New York",
    "state": "NY",
    "country": "US",
    "postalCode": "10001"
  },
  "phone": "+1-555-000-0000",
  "website": "https://acme.example.com",
  "taxId": "US12-3456789",
  "currency": "USD",
  "fiscalYearStartMonth": 1,
  "completeOnboarding": true
}

request.description:
Update company profile and onboarding information.

**Required role:** company_admin

- `brandColor`: Must be a valid hex color (e.g. `#2563EB`)
- `currency`: 3-letter ISO code (e.g. `USD`, `EUR`, `PKR`)
- `fiscalYearStartMonth`: 1–12
- `completeOnboarding`: Set to `true` to mark onboarding as complete

formdata.description: Company logo image (JPEG, PNG, WebP). Max 5MB.

request.description:
Upload a company logo. Accepts `multipart/form-data` with a `logo` field.

**Required role:** company_admin

Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP. Maximum size: 5MB.

Update invoice numbering and default settings.

**Required role:** company_admin

- `prefix`: Up to 10 characters (e.g. `INV`)
- `nextNumber`: The next invoice number to use
- `numberPadding`: Number of zero-padded digits (1–10)
- `defaultPaymentTermsDays`: 0–365

Update payroll processing settings including tax slabs.

**Required role:** company_admin

- `payDay`: 1–31
- `defaultWorkingDaysPerMonth`: 1–31
- `taxSlabs`: Array of `{ upTo?, rate }` — last slab can omit `upTo` to act as the catch-all

item.name: Users
item.description:
Manage team members (users) within the company.

**Required roles:** company_admin (write), any role (read).

query.description: Filter by role: company_admin | hr_manager | accountant | staff

request.description: Paginated list of all users in the company. Filter by `role` or `isActive`.

Invite a new user to the company. Sends an invite email.

**Required role:** company_admin

- `role`: company_admin | hr_manager | accountant | staff
- `password`: Optional. If omitted, the user must set their password via email.
Get a single user by MongoDB ObjectId.

Update a user's name, role, or active status.

**Required role:** company_admin

At least one field must be provided.

Permanently delete a user from the company.

**Required role:** company_admin

item.name: Clients
item.description:
Manage billing clients.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant (write); any role (read).

request.description: Paginated list of all clients.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "TechCorp Inc.",
  "email": "billing@techcorp.com",
  "phone": "+1-555-111-2222",
  "companyNameOfClient": "TechCorp Inc.",
  "billingAddress": {
    "line1": "456 Tech Avenue",
    "city": "San Francisco",
    "state": "CA",
    "country": "US",
    "postalCode": "94102"
  },
  "taxId": "US98-7654321",
  "notes": "Net-30 payment terms preferred."
}

request.description:
Create a new billing client.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant
Get a single client by ID.
Get all invoices associated with a specific client.

Update client details.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant

Permanently delete a client.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant

item.name: Invoice Templates
item.description:
Manage PDF invoice templates with custom branding, layout, and design.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant (write); any role (read).

request.description: List all invoice templates for the company.

Create a new invoice template with custom design.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant

- `baseTheme`: classic | modern | minimal | bold | custom
- `headerStyle`: logo-left | logo-right | logo-center | logo-top-banner
- `fontFamily`: Inter | Roboto | Lato | Merriweather | Poppins | Custom
Generate a PDF preview of an unsaved template design without creating a template record. Returns HTML or PDF for rendering.
Get a single invoice template by ID.

Update a template's name, base theme, or design.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant

Delete an invoice template.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant

Clone an existing template with a new name.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant

Set a template as the default for new invoices.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant
Generate a PDF preview using a saved template with sample data.

item.name: Invoices
item.description:
Full invoice lifecycle management: create, send, track payments, cancel.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant (write); any role (read).

request.description: Get an invoice by its public share token. No authentication required — intended for client-facing share links.
Download the PDF of an invoice using its public share token. No authentication required.

query.description: Search by invoice number or client name
Filter by status: draft | sent | paid | partially_paid | overdue | cancelled
Filter invoices issued from this date (ISO format)
Filter invoices issued up to this date (ISO format)

request.description: Paginated list of invoices. Filter by `status`, `clientId`, or date range.

body.raw:
{
  "clientId": "{{client_id}}",
  "templateId": "{{template_id}}",
  "issueDate": "2025-06-01",
  "dueDate": "2025-07-01",
  "items": [
    {
      "description": "Web Development Services — June 2025",
      "quantity": 80,
      "unitPrice": 75,
      "taxRate": 10,
      "discount": 5,
      "discountType": "percentage"
    },
    {
      "description": "UI/UX Design",
      "quantity": 20,
      "unitPrice": 90
    }
  ],
  "shippingFee": 0,
  "currency": "USD",
  "notes": "Payment due within 30 days of issue date.",
  "termsAndConditions": "Late payments are subject to a 1.5% monthly interest charge.",
  "poNumber": "PO-2025-0456"
}

request.description:
Create a new invoice in DRAFT status.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant

- At least one line item is required
- `discountType`: percentage | flat
- `currency`: 3-letter ISO code
Get a single invoice by ID with all details.
Download the generated PDF for an invoice. Returns the PDF file or a URL to it.

Update a DRAFT invoice. Sent or finalized invoices may have limited update capabilities.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant

Permanently delete an invoice.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant

Cancel an invoice with an optional reason.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant

Mark an invoice as SENT and email it to the client. Status changes from DRAFT → SENT.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant

Record a payment against an invoice. Automatically updates the invoice status to PAID or PARTIALLY_PAID.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant

- `method`: cash | bank_transfer | card | cheque | other
- `amount`: Must be greater than 0

Send a payment reminder email to the client for an outstanding invoice.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant

item.name: Departments
item.description:
Manage organizational departments.

**Required roles:** company_admin, hr_manager (write); any role (read).

request.description: Paginated list of all departments.

Create a new department.

**Required roles:** company_admin, hr_manager

- `headOfDepartment`: MongoDB ObjectId of an employee (optional)
Get a single department by ID.

Update a department's details or active status.

**Required roles:** company_admin, hr_manager

Delete a department.

**Required roles:** company_admin, hr_manager

item.name: Employees
item.description:
Manage employee profiles, salary structures, and avatars.

**Required roles:** company_admin, hr_manager (write); any role (read).

query.description: Search by name, email, or employee code
Filter by status: active | inactive | terminated

request.description: Paginated list of employees. Filter by `departmentId` or `status`.

Create a new employee record with salary structure.

**Required roles:** company_admin, hr_manager

- Must provide either `salaryStructureId` (reference existing) OR `salaryStructure` (create inline)
- `employmentType`: full_time | part_time | contract
- `allowances/deductions type`: fixed | percentage_of_base
Get a single employee's full profile by ID.
Get all salary slips generated for a specific employee.

Update employee profile details.

**Required roles:** company_admin, hr_manager

- `status`: active | inactive | terminated
- `dateOfLeaving`: Required when setting status to terminated

Permanently delete an employee record.

**Required roles:** company_admin, hr_manager

formdata.description: Employee avatar image (JPEG, PNG, WebP). Max 5MB.

request.description:
Upload or replace an employee's avatar photo.

**Required roles:** company_admin, hr_manager

Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP. Maximum size: 5MB.

item.name: Salary Structures
item.description:
Reusable salary templates with base salary, allowances, and deductions.

**Required roles:** company_admin, hr_manager (write); any role (read).

query.description: Filter template structures only: true | false

request.description: Paginated list of salary structures. Use `isTemplate=true` to show only reusable templates.

Create a new salary structure or template.

**Required roles:** company_admin, hr_manager

- `type`: fixed | percentage_of_base
- `isTemplate`: Set to `true` to make it reusable across multiple employees
Get a single salary structure by ID.

Update a salary structure. All fields are optional.

**Required roles:** company_admin, hr_manager

Delete a salary structure.

**Required roles:** company_admin, hr_manager

item.name: Payroll
item.description:
Process, manage, and report on payroll runs.

**Required roles:** company_admin, hr_manager (write); any role (read).

query.description: Filter by status: draft | processing | completed | cancelled

request.description: Paginated list of payroll runs. Filter by `year` or `status`.

query.description: Number of recent months to include in the summary (1–36, default: 6)

request.description: Get a payroll summary report for the last N months including total costs, department breakdown, and trend data.

Trigger a payroll run for the specified month/year.

**Required roles:** company_admin, hr_manager

- `month`: 1–12
- `year`: 2000–2100
- `employeeIds`: Optional array of employee ObjectIds to limit the run. If omitted, all active employees are processed.
- For companies with >50 active employees, processing is handled asynchronously via a background job.
Get a single payroll run by ID with full details and statistics.
Get all salary slips generated as part of a specific payroll run.

Finalize a payroll run, locking it from further changes. Status changes to COMPLETED.

**Required roles:** company_admin, hr_manager

Delete a payroll run (only allowed if status is DRAFT).

**Required roles:** company_admin, hr_manager

item.name: Salary Slips
item.description:
View, download, and manage individual salary slips.

**Required roles:** company_admin, hr_manager (mark paid); any role (read).

query.description: Filter by payment status: pending | paid

request.description: Paginated list of salary slips. Filter by employee, payroll run, period, or payment status.
Get a single salary slip by ID with full breakdown.
Download the PDF of a salary slip.

Mark a salary slip as paid with an optional payment date.

**Required roles:** company_admin, hr_manager

item.name: Dashboard
item.description:
Financial analytics and reporting dashboards.

**Required roles:** company_admin, hr_manager, accountant.

request.description: High-level overview: total revenue, outstanding invoices, total employees, payroll cost this month, and pending tasks.
Monthly revenue trend data (paid invoices) for the last N months or a custom date range.
Count and total value of invoices grouped by status (draft, sent, paid, partially_paid, overdue, cancelled).
Monthly payroll cost trend for the last N months.

query.description: Number of top clients to return (1–50)

request.description: Top clients ranked by outstanding (unpaid) invoice amounts.
Aggregated financial summary for a period: total invoiced, collected, outstanding, payroll costs, and net income.
Accounts receivable aging report: buckets of outstanding invoices by age (0–30, 31–60, 61–90, 90+ days).
Collection performance metrics: collection rate, average days to payment, and total collected vs billed.
Revenue breakdown by client for the specified period.
Payroll cost breakdown by department for the specified period.
Projected cash flow based on outstanding invoices due dates and estimated payroll obligations.
Export the full financial report as PDF or CSV for the given date range.

item.name: Audit Logs
item.description:
Immutable audit trail of all state-changing operations.

**Required role:** company_admin only.

query.description: Filter by action string (e.g. auth.login, employee.create)

request.description: Paginated audit log. Filter by action, actor, resource type, date range, or outcome.
Get a distinct list of all audit action strings recorded for this company (useful for building filter dropdowns).

item.name: Tax Rates
item.description:
Manage reusable tax rates for invoice line items.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant (write); any role (read).

query.description: Include archived tax rates: true | false

request.description: Paginated list of tax rates. Active rates only by default; set `includeArchived=true` to include archived.

Create a new tax rate.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant

- `rate`: 0–100 (percentage)
- `isDefault`: Set to `true` to use this rate on new invoice items by default

Update a tax rate. Use `isArchived: true` to archive it without deletion.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant

Permanently delete a tax rate.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant

item.name: Export
item.description:
Export data as Excel files.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant, hr_manager.

request.description: Export all invoices to an Excel (.xlsx) file.
Export all clients to an Excel (.xlsx) file.
Export all employees to an Excel (.xlsx) file.
Export all payroll runs to an Excel (.xlsx) file.
Export all salary slips to an Excel (.xlsx) file.

item.name: AI Assistant
item.description:
AI-powered features for invoice drafting, item descriptions, and payroll analysis.

**Rate limited.** Requires Groq API key to be configured on the server.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant (invoice AI); company_admin, hr_manager, accountant (payroll AI).

request.description: Check if the AI service is configured and available. Returns `{ available: true/false }`. Returns 503 if the Groq API key is not set.

Use AI to draft an invoice from a natural language prompt. Returns structured invoice data ready to be submitted to POST /invoices.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant

- `prompt`: Describe what to invoice (min 3 characters)
- `clientId`: Optional — pre-select the client
- `dueDate`: Optional — format YYYY-MM-DD

Generate a professional invoice line item description using AI.

**Required roles:** company_admin, accountant

- `name`: Service or item name
- `hours`: Optional — number of hours worked
- `context`: Optional — additional context (max 500 chars)

query.description: Force re-generation bypassing cache: true | false

request.description:
Generate AI-powered insights for a completed payroll run: anomaly detection, cost trends, optimization suggestions.

**Required roles:** company_admin, hr_manager, accountant

Results are cached (default TTL: 24h). Set `refresh=true` to force regeneration.

Chat with the AI about payroll data. Supports multi-turn conversations.

**Required roles:** company_admin, hr_manager, accountant

- `payrollId`: Optional — focus on a specific payroll run
- `messages`: Array of `{ role: 'user'|'assistant', content }`. Max 20 messages, max 2000 chars each.

item.name: Notifications
item.description: In-app notification management for the authenticated user.

request.description: Get all notifications for the authenticated user (most recent first), including unread count.
Mark all unread notifications as read for the authenticated user.
Mark a single notification as read by ID.
